# Workflows

Build durable, multi-step applications using the Workers platform

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Cloudflare Workflows](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/index.md): Build durable, multi-step applications on Cloudflare Workers that automatically retry and persist state.

## Python Workflows SDK

- [Python Workflows SDK](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/python/index.md): Build Cloudflare Workflows using the Python SDK with WorkflowEntrypoint on the Workers platform.
- [Interact with a Workflow](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/python/bindings/index.md): Trigger and manage Workflows from Python Workers using FFI bindings to Cloudflare resources.
- [DAG Workflows](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/python/dag/index.md): Define directed acyclic graph (DAG) Workflows in Python with declarative step dependencies.
- [Python Workers API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/python/python-workers-api/index.md): Reference for the Python Workflows SDK, including WorkflowEntrypoint, step methods, and configuration options.

## Videos

- [Videos](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/videos/index.md): Video tutorials and walkthroughs for building applications with Cloudflare Workflows.

## Examples

- [Examples](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/examples/index.md): Code examples demonstrating common Cloudflare Workflows patterns and integrations.
- [Agents](https://developers.cloudflare.com/agents/index.md): Build AI-powered Agents on Cloudflare
- [Export and save D1 database](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/examples/backup-d1/index.md): Send invoice when shopping cart is checked out and paid for
- [Dynamic Workflows](https://developers.cloudflare.com/dynamic-workers/usage/dynamic-workflows/index.md): Run different Workflow logic for each user or tenant by combining Workflows with Dynamic Workers
- [Pay cart and send invoice](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/examples/send-invoices/index.md): Send invoice when shopping cart is checked out and paid for
- [Integrate Workflows with Twilio](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/examples/twilio/index.md): Integrate Workflows with Twilio. Learn how to receive and send text messages and phone calls via APIs and Webhooks.
- [Human-in-the-Loop Image Tagging with waitForEvent](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/examples/wait-for-event/index.md): Human-in-the-loop Workflow with waitForEvent API

## Workflows REST API

- [Workflows REST API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/api/resources/workflows/methods/list/index.md): REST API reference for managing and triggering Cloudflare Workflows programmatically.

## build

- [Call Workflows from Pages](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/build/call-workflows-from-pages/index.md): Bind and trigger Cloudflare Workflows from Pages Functions using service bindings or fetch calls.
- [Events and parameters](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/build/events-and-parameters/index.md): Pass data to Workflows using events and parameters, including request details, database records, and webhook payloads.
- [Local Development](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/build/local-development/index.md): Develop and test Cloudflare Workflows locally using Wrangler's emulated runtime.
- [Rules of Workflows](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/build/rules-of-workflows/index.md): Best practices for building resilient Workflows, including idempotency, state management, and error handling.
- [Sleeping and retrying](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/build/sleeping-and-retrying/index.md): Configure sleep durations and retry logic for Workflows steps, including relative and absolute sleep timers.
- [Step context](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/build/step-context/index.md): Access runtime information in Workflows steps using the WorkflowStepContext object, including step name and retry attempt.
- [Test Workflows](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/testing/vitest-integration/test-apis/#workflowsindex.md): Write and run automated tests for Cloudflare Workflows using the Vitest integration.
- [Trigger Workflows](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/build/trigger-workflows/index.md): Trigger Workflows from Workers bindings, the REST API, or the Wrangler CLI.
- [Visualize Workflows](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/build/visualizer/index.md): View a visual diagram of your Workflow steps, conditionals, and parallel logic in the Cloudflare dashboard.
- [Workers API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/build/workers-api/index.md): Reference for the Workflows Workers API, including WorkflowEntrypoint, step methods, and instance management.

## get-started

- [Build a Durable AI Agent](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/get-started/durable-agents/index.md): Build a durable AI agent using Cloudflare Workflows that researches GitHub repositories with automatic retries.
- [Build your first Workflow](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/get-started/guide/index.md): Create and deploy your first Cloudflare Workflow with durable, multi-step execution on the Workers platform.

## observability

- [Metrics and analytics](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/observability/metrics-analytics/index.md): Query Workflows execution metrics, error rates, and step durations via the dashboard or GraphQL Analytics API.

## reference

- [Release notes](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/reference/changelog/index.md): Latest release notes and changes for Cloudflare Workflows.
- [Event subscriptions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/reference/event-subscriptions/index.md): Subscribe to Workflows lifecycle events, including instance completion and failure notifications.
- [Glossary](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/reference/glossary/index.md): Definitions of key terms used in the Cloudflare Workflows documentation.
- [Limits](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/reference/limits/index.md): Limits for Cloudflare Workflows, including maximum steps, payload sizes, and instance concurrency.
- [Pricing](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/reference/pricing/index.md): Cloudflare Workflows pricing based on CPU time, requests, and duration, included in Workers Free and Paid plans.
- [Wrangler commands](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workflows/reference/wrangler-commands/index.md): Wrangler CLI commands for managing, deploying, and interacting with Cloudflare Workflows.
